Middle Eastern Grills,
Made Modern

About Us Franchise

About Us

Built around one big idea

Persian Kebab Co. is a modern Middle Eastern quick service restaurant built around kebabs and rolls.

"Making Middle Eastern grills more modern, accessible, and repeatable."

While cuisines like pizza, burgers, Mexican, and fried chicken have developed strong quick-service ecosystems, Middle Eastern cuisine has largely remained fine dine or fragmented and unstructured in India. We saw an opportunity to build a cleaner, more scalable format around the category.


Our approach is simple: great grilling, clean flavours, fast service, and consistency. The menu combines fire-grilled kebabs, wraps, classic Middle Eastern sides, desserts, and chai into a format designed for everyday eating.

The Menu

Fire-grilled to order, every time

#42 Church Street, Bangalore  •  Open 12 PM – 1 AM every day

How It Works

Seven steps from enquiry to opening day

The Opportunity

Why Middle Eastern cuisine — and why now?

01

No dedicated brand

India has no structured Middle Eastern quick service restaurant brand. The category is wide open for a first mover.

02

QSR format

Fast, affordable, no reservations needed. Built for everyday eating.

03

Bold, distinctive flavours

Open-flame grilled, marinated with Middle Eastern spices. A genuine point of difference in a crowded deep fried kebab market.

Why Invest

Built for Franchisees

01

First-mover advantage

No dominant Middle Eastern quick service restaurant brand in India. Get in before the market consolidates.

02

Low SKU, easy to operate

Focused menu means faster training, less waste, and simpler kitchen operations.

03

Strong grill-format margins

Middle Eastern grill formats have lean cost structures and simple operations — ideal for first-time F&B owners.

04

Full playbook provided

SOPs, staff training, sourcing, brand kit, and marketing support — everything from day one.
